Hero.name: Vache Simonyan — Attorney at Law
Hero.tagline: Uncompromising advocacy at the intersection of business law, litigation, and strategic advisory. Where your adversary meets their match.

Philosophy.label: The person
Philosophy.body1: Born from a tradition of principled argumentation, Vache brings a decade of precision legal thinking to every matter. Not a generalist. A strategist — one who studies the full battlefield before the first move is made.
Philosophy.education: Yerevan State University of Law · Bar of Armenia · Admitted 2014
Philosophy.versusSub: “Against” — from Latin. In every legal conflict, there is a versus. Vache's name carries it. His method embodies it.
Philosophy.body2: Every case is a contest of preparation, framing, and resolve. The question is never if a position can be argued — but how precisely it can be constructed, and how relentlessly it can be defended.

items.title: Commercial Litigation
items.desc: High-stakes dispute resolution for businesses in Armenia and cross-border contexts. From breach of contract to shareholder conflicts.
items.outcome: Secured full damages recovery in a ₽47M contract dispute — opposing counsel settled on day two of trial.

items.title: Corporate Advisory
items.desc: Formation, governance, M&A structuring, and ongoing strategic counsel for founders and institutional clients.
items.outcome: Restructured holding group across three jurisdictions — zero tax exposure, full compliance, 90-day execution.

items.title: Real Estate & Property
items.desc: Transactional due diligence, title disputes, development agreements, and regulatory clearance for Armenian property matters.
items.outcome: Cleared a contested title on a Yerevan commercial property that had been in dispute for eleven years.

items.title: Contract Architecture
items.desc: Drafting, review, and negotiation of complex agreements — built to withstand pressure, not just pass a desk review.
items.outcome: Renegotiated a vendor agreement saving client $220K annually — completed before deadline with no relationship damage.

items.title: Regulatory & Compliance
items.desc: Navigating Armenian regulatory frameworks for fintech, media, and foreign-invested enterprises.
items.outcome: Obtained operating license for a fintech startup in 38 days — half the standard processing time.

items.title: International Arbitration
items.desc: Representation in ICC, LCIA, and ad hoc proceedings. Cross-border expertise with deep local knowledge.
items.outcome: Led arbitration defense against a European claimant — award in client's favor, full costs recovered.

IntakeForm.label: Start here
IntakeForm.question: What are we fighting today?
IntakeForm.sub: No forms. No friction. A brief conversation to understand your situation — so when we speak, we're already aligned.
IntakeForm.confirmation: Vache will review your matter personally and reach out within 24 hours. Expect directness, not boilerplate.

items.title: Why Most Business Contracts Fail Before They're Signed
items.excerpt: Legal risk is often mistaken for administrative friction. True contract architecture anticipates the divorce before the marriage.

items.title: The Anatomy of a Winnable Case
items.excerpt: Success in court is 90% framing. How we define the conflict is how we win it.

items.title: Structuring for Conflict Before It Arrives
items.excerpt: Governance is about decision-making during crisis, not just compliance during peace.

items.title: What Foreign Investors Miss About Armenian Law
items.excerpt: Local nuances in regulatory enforcement can make or break an entry strategy.

items.title: When to Settle, When to Fight: A Framework
items.excerpt: The cost of justice is not just financial; it's opportunity cost. Know when the war is worth the resources.

Footer.tagline: Precision legal strategy for those who can't afford anything less.
